assignments.title: Turtle Demo
assignments.instruction:
Turtle Demo

Demonstratie van Python Turtle.

files.initialCode:
from turtle import *

speed(7)
shape("turtle")
colors = ['red', 'purple', 'blue', 'green', 'orange', 'pink']

for x in range(300):
  pencolor(colors[x%6])
  width(x/100 + 1)
  forward(x)
  left(59)

tabs.title: Console Demo
tabs.instruction:
Console Demo

Demonstratie van Python Console.

files.initialCode:
#!/bin/python3

while True:
  print("Welke berekening wil je maken?")
  print()
  print("1: optellen")
  print("2: aftrekken")
  print("3: vermenigvuldigen")
  print("4: delen")
  print()
  
  keuze = input("maak je keuze: 1, 2, 3, 4")

  if keuze == "1" or keuze == "2" or keuze == "3" or keuze == "4":
    getal1 = int(input("geef het eerste getal"))
    getal2 = int(input("geef het tweede getal"))
    if keuze == "1":
      antwoord = getal1 + getal2
      print(getal1,"+",getal2,"=",antwoord)
    elif keuze == "2":
      antwoord = getal1 - getal2
      print(getal1,"-",getal2,"=",antwoord)
    elif keuze == "3":
      antwoord = getal1 * getal2
      print(getal1,"*",getal2,"=",antwoord)
    else:
      antwoord = getal1 / getal2
      print(getal1,"/",getal2,"=",antwoord)
  else:
    print("dit is geen juiste invoer")
